headline: SPM Examination Costs Families RM450 in Hidden Fees and Materials
context: Beyond official exam fees, families spend an average of RM450 on revision books, trial papers, and extra classes for SPM.

cards.big: SPM preparation costs families average RM450 beyond the RM120 official examination fee
cards.sub: B40 families spend proportionally 4 times more of income on exam preparation

cards.big: Trial examination paper market generates RM28 million annually from anxious students
cards.sub: Schools sell trial papers as fundraising while creating dependency on purchased materials

cards.big: Top SPM scorers attended an average of 3.2 paid revision programs in 2025
cards.sub: Correlation between spending and scores reflects economic privilege not pure merit

cards.big: MOE provides free revision materials online but only 34% of students use them
cards.sub: Quality and awareness gaps limit effectiveness of free official resources

cards.big: When exam success depends on purchasing preparation the exam measures wealth not ability
Should MOE provide comprehensive free SPM preparation materials to all students
